documents.title: Tagged.underlying / Carrier.`Protocol` migration audit
documents.summary: Phase 1 design audit for the carrier/tagged/cardinal/ordinal rename cascade. Zero own-field rawValues; zero mechanical-rename hits; build green against migrated upstreams. Editorial Int/UInt64 SLI move flagged as separable follow-up.
